company_name: Lilly oral GLP-1 Foundayo FDA approval

evidence_summary: Round126 R7 Loop-7 case for ORAL_GLP1_MAINTENANCE_THERAPY; approval, AI, capacity, telehealth, and device narratives are separated from commercialization evidence.

company_name: Boehringer / GoodRx Humira biosimilar access but uptake watch
evidence_summary: Round126 R7 Loop-7 case for BIOSIMILAR_ACCESS_CASH_PAY; approval, AI, capacity, telehealth, and device narratives are separated from commercialization evidence.

company_name: Cigna / Accredo Humira biosimilar $0 copay formulary switch
